focus: [MON-B3/D6] designer-skills-main 9-plugin command recipes: routing/utilization, argument grammar, and chaining patterns for D2/D3

graphEvents.label: How should designer-skills-main command structure be ported into sk-design D2/D3 enforcement?
designer-skills-main routes by plugin namespace plus task verb command rather than only a parent-mode wrapper
Command argument-hint fields act as a typed grammar surface with examples and branchable input kinds
Command bodies declare ordered skill choreography that can become utilization proof requirements
Follow-up suggestions encode a lightweight command graph without silent auto-chaining
The corpus headline claims 30 design-practice commands while README tables and on-disk command files show 29
Each sk-design task command should compile to a commandRecipe with ownerModes, argumentGrammar, choreography, outputContract, and nextOptions
D3 utilization passes only when every declared command choreography step has a content-bound witness in the transcript or proof card
Wrappers, command metadata, registry owner modes, generated docs, and command files must pass structural drift checks before replay scoring

label: designer-skills-main routes by plugin namespace plus task verb command rather than only a parent-mode wrapper
buildableRecommendation: Add a D2 command-projection layer over sk-design modes with commandRecipe entries pointing to registry workflowMode values.

label: Command argument-hint fields act as a typed grammar surface with examples and branchable input kinds
buildableRecommendation: Add argumentGrammar with requiredSlots, inputKinds, examples, ambiguousIf, deferToHubIf, and parse fixtures; fail generic hints for task commands.

label: Command bodies declare ordered skill choreography that can become utilization proof requirements
buildableRecommendation: Add choreography steps with required mode/resource, purpose, and witness fields; fail D3 when declared steps lack proof-card or transcript witnesses.

label: Follow-up suggestions encode a lightweight command graph without silent auto-chaining
buildableRecommendation: Add nextOptions[] with command, when, handoffArtifact, and requiresConfirmation:true; validate all next commands resolve and are suggested, not auto-run.

label: The corpus headline claims 30 design-practice commands while README tables and on-disk command files show 29
buildableRecommendation: Run structural command-surface checks before command replay: files, docs, metadata, owner modes, manifests, and wrappers must agree.

label: Each sk-design task command should compile to a commandRecipe with ownerModes, argumentGrammar, choreography, outputContract, and nextOptions
D3 utilization passes only when every declared command choreography step has a content-bound witness in the transcript or proof card
Wrappers, command metadata, registry owner modes, generated docs, and command files must pass structural drift checks before replay scoring
